zh.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: 英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特卡斯特萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Thweng於大約1268年出生在英國越可爾吉爾頓時，她的父親Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle45歲，母親Lucy de Brus43歲。她於大約1285年與Sir Roger Kryton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1325年7月20日在英國藍卡爾澤福頓享年58歲。

zh-hans.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: 英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特卡斯特萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia de Thweng于大约1268年出生在英国越可爾吉爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle45岁，母亲Lucy de Brus43岁。她于大约1285年与Sir Roger Kryton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1325年7月20日在英国藍卡爾澤福頓享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Thweng was born about 1268, in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, was 45 and her mother, Lucy de Brus, was 43. She married Sir Roger Kryton about 1285, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 20 July 1325, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia de Thweng est née environ 1268, à Kilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Brus, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Kryton environ 1285, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1325, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: Castleton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia de Thweng um 1268 in Kilton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle 45 und ihre Mutter Lucy de Brus 43. Sie hat um 1285 in Lancashire, England Sir Roger Kryton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1325 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

Lei sposato Sir Roger Kryton circa 1285, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 luglio 1325, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia de Thwengが約1268年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castleは45歳，母Lucy de Brusは43歳であった。約1285年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Roger Krytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1325年7月20日にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Thweng(이)가 대략 1268년 영국 요르크실르 킬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy de Brus(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir Roger Kryton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 7월 20일 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Thweng nasceu aproximadamente 1268, em Kilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Brus, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Kryton aproximadamente 1285, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1325, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ro.Castleton, Greater Manchester, England,: Castleton, Greater Manchester, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia de Thweng родилась около 1268 г. в местности килтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Brus, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Kryton около 1285 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 июля 1325 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Sir Roger Kryton aproximadamente 1285, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de julio de 1325, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
